title: tium remotum
intro: Tium remotum, also known as the "distant thyme," is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Thymus genus. The plant is known for its small, pink or purple flowers and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tium remotum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Tium remotum can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
